gt_sql: SELECT T2.college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id GROUP BY T2.major_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.college) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT m.college
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
GROUP BY m.college
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Which college do most of the members go to?
